findings.description: Hannah Earnest and Edwin Grice had a sixth child besides John, Hannah Grace, Edwin, William, and James: a daughter, Lydia Grice, born 10 July 1878 in West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England, and christened 8 August 1878.
supporting_sources: England, Staffordshire, Church Records, 1538-1944 — christening entry for Lydia Grice, daughter of Edwin Grice, 8 Aug 1878, West Bromwich
